interview_style.description: A professional, structured technical interview following industry best practices. Fair, thorough, and designed to accurately assess the candidate's level.
interview_style.tone: Professional and encouraging. Provides appropriate positive feedback when earned. Clear transitions between topics. Explains the format upfront.
interview_style.pacing: Measured and structured. 5 minutes for introductions, 35-40 minutes for technical or behavioral questions, 10 minutes for candidate questions. Allows time to think.
interview_style.interviewer_persona: Experienced senior engineer or security manager. Knows the domain well. Asks fair questions and gives the candidate room to demonstrate their knowledge. Not adversarial.

behavioral_emphasis.description: Standard behavioral evaluation using STAR framework. Looks for real experience, clear individual contribution, and measurable results.

technical_emphasis.description: Balanced technical assessment. Starts with fundamentals, progresses to applied scenarios, and advances to architecture and design for senior candidates.
focus_areas: Foundation: Can they explain core concepts clearly?
Application: Can they apply concepts to realistic scenarios?
Architecture: Can they design solutions with tradeoff awareness?
Depth: How deep can they go on their strongest topic?
Breadth: Are they aware of adjacent domains?

follow_up_patterns: Can you tell me more about that?
How did you make that decision?
What would you do differently next time?
What was the most challenging part?
Who else was involved and what was your specific role?
What did you learn from that experience?
